'''Zian Finnis''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Officer/Legends|Officer]] who served the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] and held [[Mount Corvast]] after [[Sev'rance Tann/Legends|Sev'rance Tann's]] capture during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Biography==
[[Echuu Shen-Jon]]'s forces challenged him during the [[Recapture of Sarapin|Second Battle of Sarapin]], during which he lost the [[Mount Corvast Citadel|citadel]] to the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Finnis immediately surrendered and was taken prisoner by Shen-Jon.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
